text:
Duran was a member of the Military Police and the Anti-Personnel Control Squad under Kenny Ackermann.

Appearance

Duran was a man of average height and build. He had short brown hair which he kept slicked back, and a thin beard, and could be seen wearing a light-colored shirt and dark pants under his anti-personnel omni-directional mobility gear.

Story

Royal Government arc

When Kenny Ackermann and his squad are tasked with kidnapping Eren Jaeger and Historia Reiss, a fight breaks out between the squad and Levi Ackermann. Duran is stationed on the roof of the tavern where his captain has cornered Levi to shoot him if he tries to escape. However, as Levi is fleeing the bar, he kills Duran and uses his body to shield himself from Duran's teammates.

People killed

Failed attempts

Levi Ackermann
